rubricFactors.factor: No naloxone access in past 30 days

aiInsights: OD frequency accelerating: 10-month gap between OD1 and OD2, 5.5 months between OD2 and OD3, 4.5 months between OD3 and OD4
Post-incarceration release pattern: 2 of 4 ODs occurred within 2 weeks of jail release
Poly-substance pattern with fentanyl + benzos significantly increases naloxone effectiveness challenges
Hep C progression without treatment increases medical complication risk
MAT discontinuation pattern: 2 starts, 2 stops — indicating engagement barriers

redFlags.flag: Opioid + Benzodiazepine combination (5x increased OD risk per CDC)
redFlags.action: Immediate naloxone kit + benzo tapering plan
ED DART protocol + warm handoff to MAT
